title: Mildly Flaky Portuguese Potato Casserole
description: A hearty and comforting Portuguese dish featuring floury potatoes and a flaky crust, perfect for a cold winter's night. The tadka seasoning adds a unique and aromatic flavor to the dish.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced potatoes and olive oil, tossing to coat.
In a small bowl, mix together the tadka seasoning, chopped onion, and minced garlic.
Add the tadka mixture to the potatoes and toss to combine.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, melted butter, beaten egg, salt, and black pepper.
Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish with cooking spray.
Create a layer of potatoes in the baking dish, followed by a layer of the flour mixture, repeating until all ingredients are used, ending with a layer of potatoes on top.
Bake the casserole for 45 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and the top is golden brown.
